# Receiver method binds a single *multipart.FileHeader field

muxt generate --use-receiver-type=T
muxt check

exec go test -cover

-- template.gohtml --
{{define "POST /upload 201 Upload(multipart)" }}<p>uploaded {{.Result}}</p>{{end}}

-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.22

-- template.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
	"mime/multipart"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type UploadForm struct {
	Avatar *multipart.FileHeader `name:"avatar"`
}

type T struct {
	spy func(UploadForm) string
}

func (t T) Upload(multipart UploadForm) string {
	return t.spy(multipart)
}

-- template_test.go --
package server

import (
	"bytes"
	"io"
	"mime/multipart"
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"testing"
)

func Test(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()

	var service T
	service.spy = func(form UploadForm) string {
		if form.Avatar == nil {
			t.Fatalf("expected Avatar file, got nil")
		}
		if form.Avatar.Filename != "hello.txt" {
			t.Errorf("filename = %q, want %q", form.Avatar.Filename, "hello.txt")
		}
		f, err := form.Avatar.Open()
		if err != nil {
			t.Fatal(err)
		}
		defer f.Close()
		body, _ := io.ReadAll(f)
		if string(body) != "hi" {
			t.Errorf("body = %q, want %q", string(body), "hi")
		}
		return form.Avatar.Filename
	}

	TemplateRoutes(mux, service)

	body := &bytes.Buffer{}
	w := multipart.NewWriter(body)
	fw, err := w.CreateFormFile("avatar", "hello.txt")
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
	if _, err := fw.Write([]byte("hi")); err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
	if err := w.Close(); err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, "/upload", body)
	req.Header.Set("content-type", w.FormDataContentType())
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()

	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)
	res := rec.Result()

	if res.StatusCode != http.StatusCreated {
		t.Errorf("status = %d %s, want %d", res.StatusCode, http.StatusText(res.StatusCode), http.StatusCreated)
	}
}
